summary: Comprehensive testing of Brazilian Electoral ERP Platform - All core features working correctly including authentication, dashboard with KPIs and charts, revenue/expense management with period filters, and reports with PDF export capability.

minor.issue: PDF export may fail if campaign CNPJ is not configured - returns 400 error with appropriate message

issues: Console warnings about chart width/height being -1 during initial render - non-blocking, visual works correctly after render

passed_tests: JWT authentication - login with valid credentials
Payment alerts endpoint with days_ahead parameter
PDF export endpoint (returns 200 or appropriate error)
UI - Dashboard KPI cards (revenue, expense, balance, pending)
UI - Dashboard charts (monthly flow, pie charts)
UI - Payment alerts display with overdue badges
UI - Receitas page with period filters
UI - Receitas add dialog with all form fields
UI - Despesas page with period filters
UI - Despesas add dialog with all form fields
UI - Relatórios page with TSE report display
UI - Relatórios SPCE export tab with PDF/JSON/CSV options
seed_data_creation: Test data for revenues and expenses created via API tests were cleaned up (deleted after verification)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features working correctly. Test data includes 1 revenue (R$ 5.000,00 from Maria Santos), 1 expense (R$ 1.500,00 from Gráfica ABC), and 2 pending payments. Campaign configured for João Silva - PSD - Vereador - São Paulo/SP. CPF/CNPJ validation API endpoints use query params format.
